---
title: "About"
description: "Why High 0.05 exists, and its roots in Medici con l'Africa CUAMM."
---

## Why this exists

Good intentions are not proof. Whether it is a hospital program or a health
product going to market, the only way to genuinely help people is to know what
actually works, and to be able to show it. High 0.05 exists to make that proof
possible: the right data, honest analysis, and results that stand up to
scrutiny.

## A spin-off of Medici con l'Africa CUAMM

High 0.05 started inside Medici con l'Africa CUAMM, which has run health
programs across sub-Saharan Africa since 1950. That work set the standard:
decisions backed by evidence, not opinion. High 0.05 carries the same standard
into health-tech, medtech and clinical research.

[Get in touch](jobs.qmd){.btn-primary-cta}
